{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Here at Teeccino, we couldn’t be more excited to be launching our 2 new blend families: Mushoom Adaptogen Blends and Prebiotic SuperBoost™ Blends. tab_content.flavor_notes: {"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Vanilla Nut was the first Teeccino flavor I ever created. I wanted to feature vanilla beans from Mexico where I was working to preserve rainforests with rural villages. My expertise is to source ingredients that can be sustainably harvested and the goal of rainforest preservation is to produce economic value for the standing trees and income for the people who live there."}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Vanilla, the only orchid used in food, has become a favorite the world over due to its unparalleled fragrance and complex heady flavor. Vanilla is indigenous to Central America where it was discovered by the native people centuries before the Spanish arrived. The Aztec Emperor Montezuma was said to be drinking an elixir for longevity made from cacao (the bean that gives us chocolate), vanilla and honey when the conquistadors were ushered in for an audience."}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Now this may seem like trivia, but do you know that each vanilla bean has to be handled hundreds of times during its 6 month curing process? They are heated in the sun and then wrapped up at night to sweat! Doesn't that bring home the wonder of nature and the cleverness of humans? It is no surprise to me that Vanilla Nut has always been our best selling Mediterranean flavor. Drink it knowing that you are helping indigenous communities find sustainable livelihoods that preserve rainforests."}]}]}

products.title: Worldwide Botanicals French Chicory Root, 1 Pound Ground, Brew Like Coffee, Blend Roasted Chicory Root With Coffee, Prebiotic, Acid Free, Caffeine Free, Kosher
products.body_html:
Roasted French chicory root is the secret to making “French Coffee” New Orleans style. Chicory imparts a smoother, less acidic flavor to coffee making it easier on both your taste buds and your stomach. It’s also an important herbal tea ingredient that adds more body to weak teas.

Chicory root contains the highest amount of inulin of any food. Inulin is the prebiotic soluble fiber that feeds your beneficial digestive flora, also called probiotics. Brewing chicory root in hot water naturally extracts its inulin. Improve gut health and support your immune system with a daily cup of roasted chicory that keeps your probiotics flourishing!

County of origin: France

Roasted Organic French Chicory Root is the secret to making “French Coffee” New Orleans style. Chicory imparts a smoother, less acidic flavor to coffee making it easier on both your taste buds and your stomach. It’s also an important herbal tea ingredient that adds more body to weak teas.

Chicory root contains the highest amount of inulin of any food. Inulin is the prebiotic soluble fiber that feeds your beneficial digestive flora, also called probiotics. Brewing chicory root in hot water naturally extracts its inulin. Improve gut health and support your immune system with a daily cup of roasted chicory that keeps your probiotics flourishing!

County of origin: France
products.featured_image_alt: Front view of an organic French chicory coffee alternative in a bright green resealable pouch with botanical leaf illustrations. The packaging features “Organic French Chicory” made from Cichorium intybus, labeled as an all-purpose filter grind and USDA Organic. A magnifying glass highlights the coarse roasted chicory granules beside the pouch. Designed as a caffeine-free coffee substitute, the product emphasizes rich roasted flavor, natural prebiotics, digestive support, and sustainably sourced botanicals

products.title: Worldwide Botanicals Organic Lemon Balm Tea, 25 Tea Bags - 50% more herbs with 2.25g per teabag - 100% Pure Lemon Balm Leaves, Kosher
products.body_html: A beloved herb of herbalists throughout the ages, lemon balm upholds its reputation as the “herb that makes the heart and mind merry” as claimed by the famous English herbalist, Nicholas Culpepper. Its heady aromatic lemon scent makes it the perfect cup of tea to be enjoyed any time of the day or night when the nervous system needs calming down and the mood needs to be uplifted. Many aficionados of lemon balm claim they sleep longer and deeper after drinking a cup of its fragrant brew at night. <br><br>It is reputed to strengthen the brain and memory making it a good tea to call upon when mental fortitude is required. With its aromatic essential oils that naturally extract from the leaf during steeping, lemon balm aids good digestion by relieving gas and discomfort. <br><br>With over 40 years of experience sourcing premier botanicals, Worldwide Botanicals develops and works in partnership with suppliers to import the highest quality products. We are not always the cheapest but our botanicals are the best.<br><br>Packaged in the USA

The packaging is light green with soft botanical leaf illustrations and a centered yellow label that reads “Organic Lemon Balm” with the botanical name Melissa officinalis. A USDA Organic seal appears on the lower right of the label. Text at the bottom notes the tea is caffeine free and contains 25 tea bags, emphasizing a clean, natural, herbal aesthetic.
